title: Exa Search
description: Exposes Exa semantic web search as an agent tool.
Performs real-time web searches via the Exa API and returns structured results with titles, URLs, text content, relevance scores, and dates.

tool_exa_search.numResults.title: Number of Results
tool_exa_search.numResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-50)

tool_exa_search.useAutoprompt.title: Use Autoprompt
tool_exa_search.useAutoprompt.description: Let Exa optimize the query for better results

tool_exa_search.includeText.title: Include Text Content
tool_exa_search.includeText.description: Include full text content in results (uses get_contents)
